name: coalledger
description: CoalLedger — docs-health canary suite (CoalMine for DOCS). Part of the TheColliery mining series.

plugins.name: coalledger
plugins.description: Docs-health canary suite — 6+1 canaries: grounding (WRONG), standard (INCOMPLETE), rot (STALE), consistency (CONTRADICTORY), structure (BROKEN — vendored CommonMark+GFM AST engine, never regex; Thai/CJK-safe), quality (UNREADABLE), config-gated leak. Honest frame: CommonMark+GFM fidelity, NOT GitHub-pixel fidelity; severity judged by context; fixes choice-gated, never auto-applied. Zero-dependency, offline by default, no API keys.
